The '''Juggernaut 510 Combat Power Armor''' was a rare assault [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] manufactured by [[Cozzell Corporation]].

==Specifications==
The powersuit provided full body protection against kinetic and energy attacks and came with a climate-controlled [[Body glove/Legends|body glove]]. It also enhanced the wearer's strength and provided a 180 degree [[Macrobinoculars/Legends|macrobinocular]] vision sensor system which included a [[Multi-Frequency Targeting and Acquisition System/Legends|Multi-Frequency Targeting and Acquisition System]]. A handheld [[Medium repeating blaster/Legends|medium repeating blaster]] came with the armor, and a grenade launcher was mounted on the left shoulder. Moreover, a retractable set of claws was installed in the left gauntlet.<ref name="OBA" /> However, the suit was bulky and slow, and it had a set of insufficiently armored power transfer routing conduits on the back, which, when targeted by [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire, could knock out power to the medium blaster and the grenade launcher.<ref name="gundark" />

==History==
Juggernaut armors were developed for use with mercenary and militia forces for heavy firepower infantry support. While effective, the Juggernaut armor was also very expensive to produce, and Cozell Corporation eventually canceled the project. It remains unknown whether a fully operational prototype was ever made, but rumors had it that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had access to a prototype and were subjecting it to various tests. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] even dispatched a group of agents to sabotage the project, but it is unknown whether they succeeded or not.<ref name="OBA" />

Later, one of Cozzell's lead designers for the project, [[Sarvel Tal-Oldra]], decided to continue work on the armor despite Cozzell's cancellation. He went to [[Klaus Vandangante/Legends|Doc's]] former [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]] base in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], where he began custom manufacturing Juggernaut suits.<ref name="gundark" />
